title: Marlborough Deals
meta_desc: Discover the best family deals in Marlborough & Blenheim, including activity discounts, campervan hires, and travel insurance from $4.50/day, perfect for families with kids aged 5+
intro: Planning a family holiday in Marlborough & Blenheim? With a budget of $180-$300/day for a family of 4, you can enjoy sunlit sounds, wildlife cruises, and NZ's sunniest wine region. Bookme.co.nz offers up to 40% off activities, making it an ideal destination for families. The best ages for this destination are 5+, with plenty of activities suitable for kids, including dolphin watch cruises, the Queen Charlotte Track, and Picton township and foreshore.

sections.heading: Current Booking Deals and Discounts
sections.body:
Looking for the best deals in Marlborough & Blenheim? Look no further than Bookme.co.nz for activity discounts, Discover Cars for campervan hires from $89/day, and Cover-More for family travel insurance from $4.50/day. These deals can help you save up to 40% on activities, making your family holiday more affordable.

For example, you can book a dolphin watch cruise in the Marlborough Sounds for a discounted price, or hire a family campervan for a road trip around the region. Don't forget to check out the free cancellation policy on most holiday park and motel bookings on Booking.com.
list: Up to 40% off activities on Bookme.co.nz
Campervan hires from $89/day on Discover Cars
Family travel insurance from $4.50/day on Cover-More

sections.heading: Best-Value Activities for Families
sections.body:
Marlborough & Blenheim offer a range of activities suitable for families with kids aged 5+, including dolphin watch cruises, the Queen Charlotte Track, and Picton township and foreshore. The Queen Charlotte Track is a great option for families, with short sections that are family-friendly and offer stunning views of the Marlborough Sounds.

For a more relaxing experience, head to Momorangi Bay for some sheltered swimming and warm water, ideal for small kids. The Pelorus Bridge Scenic Reserve is another hidden gem, with crystal clear river swimming that's unforgettable in summer.
list: Queen Charlotte Track: free, but guided tours available from $50-$100 per person

sections.heading: Money-Saving Tips for Families
sections.body:
Planning a family holiday in Marlborough & Blenheim can be expensive, but there are ways to save money. Here are some tips to help you make the most of your budget:

Firstly, book your activities and accommodation in advance to get the best prices. Consider hiring a campervan instead of booking multiple hotel rooms, and look for free activities like visiting the Picton foreshore and Waitohi Picton play area.
list: Book activities and accommodation in advance to get the best prices
Consider hiring a campervan instead of booking multiple hotel rooms
Look for free activities like visiting the Picton foreshore and Waitohi Picton play area
Pack your own food and snacks instead of eating out for every meal
Take advantage of the free cancellation policy on most holiday park and motel bookings
Use travel insurance to protect against unexpected cancellations or interruptions

sections.heading: When to Book for the Best Prices
sections.body:
To get the best prices for your family holiday in Marlborough & Blenheim, it's essential to book in advance. The earlier you book, the more likely you are to get discounts on activities and accommodation.

Consider booking during the off-season, from April to October, when prices are generally lower. However, keep in mind that some activities and attractions may be closed or have limited hours during this time.
